title: Management Consultant Analyst
description: Northwestern Mutual is seeking a Management Consultant Analyst to support strategic initiatives across our organization. You'll analyze operational processes, develop business cases, and recommend improvements that enhance efficiency and profitability. Work remotely for a 166-year-old financial services leader committed to sound business practices and client success.
responsibilities: Conduct analytical research on operational and business challenges
Develop detailed recommendations supported by data analysis and industry best practices
Prepare presentations and business cases for senior leadership review
Support project implementation and track progress against KPIs
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Economics, or related field
skills: Familiarity with insurance or financial services (preferred)

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
